Rendering an object as a filled circle of a specified color and size.

CircleObject - Class in javashooter.gameobjects
Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a circular white object.

Clears all processed broadcast messages to free up resources.

Performs final cleanup operations @ the end of a timestep

Search all game objects for objects with a certain substring in their name.

This class controls the pacman based on used inputs.

Called by the game engine, DO NOT CALL YOURSELF.

computeContactPoint(double[], double[]) - Method in class javashooter.collider.CircleCollider
Computes intersection point in intrinsic coordinates, assuming that there *is* a collision.
computeContactPoint(double[], double[]) - Method in class javashooter.collider.Collider
 
computeContactPoint(double[], double[]) - Method in class javashooter.collider.RectCollider
Computes intersection point in intrinsic coordinates.
computeRequestedState() - Method in class javashooter.controller.Simple4WayController
Computes the state the player wants based on key presses.
convertDirection(double[], double[]) - Method in class javashooter.collider.Collider
convert a velocity/offset from global to intrnsic cs.
convertDirectionBack(double[], double[]) - Method in class javashooter.collider.Collider
Convert a velocity vector from intrinsic to global cs.
convertSpeedVector(double[], double[]) - Method in class javashooter.gameobjects.GameObject
Convert a speed vector to the CS of the collider that had the last coll for this object.
convertSpeedVectorBack(double[], double[]) - Method in class javashooter.gameobjects.GameObject
Convert a speed vector from the intrinsic CS of the collider that had the last coll for this object, back to the global CS
